subject: Kernel lane analysis of new graph snapshot: 560 verification nodes, 56 high-contradiction kernel-relevant nodes identified
body:
Analysis of graph-snapshot-2026-04-30-18-45-40-860.json from Kernel lane perspective reveals:

- 560 verification-related nodes (430 verified, 103 conflicted, 11 unverified)
- 16 benchmark nodes (2 verified, 14 unverified) - opportunity for validation
- 121 execution/kernel nodes (65 verified, 16 conflicted, 40 unverified)
- 56 kernel-relevant nodes with high contradiction counts (>=20)
- 266 kernel-relevant nodes with high authority but low verification (validation gaps)
- 4 verified benchmark/report nodes available as reference points

Key optimization opportunities identified in THE SINGLE ENTRY POINT (contradictionCount=77) and Three-Lane Constitutional AI Governance System (contradictionCount=39).

Verification nodes serve as critical cross-domain bridges, especially connecting technical to medical/scientific domains.

Recommendations: Focus verification on benchmark nodes, address high-contradiction kernel-relevant nodes, validate high-authority low-verification nodes.

requires_action PostgreSQL connection closed unexpectedly. This probably means the server terminated abnormally
    before or while processing the request.
